name: Peach Refrigerator Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the marshmallows into quarters.
2. Combine the marshmallows with orange juice and stir over hot water until almost melted, but not fully. Allow to cool slightly.
3. Add ginger ale and continue stirring.
4. When the mixture is thickened, gently fold in 3/4 cup of whipped cream.
5. Line a spring form pan with waxed paper.
6. Arrange alternating layers of sponge cake or lady fingers and peaches.
7. Add layers of marshmallow filling between each layer of cake and peaches.
8. Repeat the layering process until there are three layers of cake, two layers of marshmallows, and four layers of peaches.
9. Chill in the refrigerator overnight.
10. Remove from the pan before serving and garnish with remaining fresh peaches and whipped cream.
